text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I won, Trainer! I took first place!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I hope you got a good look at just how awesome I was!
choice_data_list: I sure did. Let's celebrate tonight over dinner!
I sure did. Let's celebrate tonight over dinner!
I hope you're just as cool in the next race too!
I hope you're just as cool in the next race too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I hope you got a good look at just how awesome I was!
choice_data_list: I sure did. Let's celebrate tonight over dinner!
I sure did. Let's celebrate tonight over dinner!
I hope you're just as cool in the next race too!
I hope you're just as cool in the next race too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A victory feast, huh? Sounds wicked!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But... I should tell you something.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna get this excited every time I win,
you're gonna tire yourself out pretty quick.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh... I mean that I've got a ton more wins
coming.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y'know, there's no end on the road to cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've taken my first step, so now it's time to put the
pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer. That goes without sayin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This track belongs to me from now on! I'm gonna
run like hell and win 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's more like a promise to myself. After all, if I
lose...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'd be letting you and everyone else rootin' for me
down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And there's no way I'm gonna do somethin' lame
like that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry, Trainer! I'm always gonna keep
bein' cool!
